title: 1 step DFU - User can trigger firmware update for just earbuds
scenario: Selective firmware update for earbuds only completes successfully while charging case remains on lower version on Voyager Free 60+ UC
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Ensure both earbuds (Voyager Free 60+ UC) and the charging case are connected and both are on firmware version 5039 or higher.
4. Tap the Update button for the earbuds only (do not select the charging case update).
5. Wait for the earbuds firmware update to complete.
expected: Only the earbuds DFU completes successfully; the charging case remains on the lower firmware version.
